site: https://ipprotectionregistry.org/
name: International IP Protection Registry
type: Editorial reference registry
primary_language: en
coverage: International
domain_focus: Intellectual property protection across jurisdictions

summary:
Structured international registry explaining how intellectual property protection operates across jurisdictions.
Editorial reference content, not marketing content.

content_model:
One professional domain in one jurisdiction.

key_areas:
- Patents
- Trademarks
- Designs
- Copyright
- Cross-border protection
- Authorities
- Legislation
- Process
- Required documents
- Timelines

main_urls:
- https://ipprotectionregistry.org/
- https://ipprotectionregistry.org/jurisdictions

more:
https://ipprotectionregistry.org/llms-full.txt
